zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Hutchinson於1459年9月27日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親John Hutchinson27歲，母親Katherine Conyers24歲。他於1480年與Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1510年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Hutchinson于1459年9月27日出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲John Hutchinson27岁，母亲Katherine Conyers24岁。他于1480年与Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1510年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Hutchinson was born on 27 September 1459, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hutchinson, was 27 and his mother, Katherine Conyers, was 24. He married Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson in 1480, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1510.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Hutchinson est né le 27 septembre 1459, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hutchinson, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Katherine Conyers, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson en 1480, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1510.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Hutchinson am 27. September 1459 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hutchinson 27 und seine Mutter Katherine Conyers 24. Er hat 1480 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1510.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hutchinson è nato il il 27 settembre 1459 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Hutchinson, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Conyers, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson nel 1480, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1510.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Hutchinsonが1459年9月27日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Hutchinsonは27歳，母Katherine Conyersは24歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでMrs. Matilda Hutchinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1510年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hutchinson(이)가 1459년 9월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hutchinson(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Conyers(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Hutchinson nasceu em 27 de setembro de 1459, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hutchinson, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Conyers, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson em 1480, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1510.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Hutchinson родился 27 сентября 1459 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Hutchinson было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Conyers, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson в 1480 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1510 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Hutchinson nació el 27 de septiembre de 1459, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hutchinson, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Katherine Conyers, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mrs. Matilda Hutchinson en 1480, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1510.
